_description: SB tentative rulings index page from old.sb-court.org (iframe content). ASP.NET HTML table listing all available tentative ruling PDFs.
_notes: The SB new site (sanbernardino.courts.ca.gov) returns 'Access denied' to automated requests. This fixture is from the legacy site at old.sb-court.org which responds to plain httpx requests with no auth, JS, or cookies. Link text contains only the PDF filename — judge name and department are extracted from the filename pattern and PDF text respectively.
